title: RapidAPI Gateway Configuration
description: Schema representing a RapidAPI Gateway configuration, including routing rules, authentication, rate limiting, security policies, and deployment settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the gateway instance

description.description: Description of the gateway's purpose and configuration

deploymentModel.description: How the gateway is deployed within the infrastructure

status.description: Current operational status of the gateway

baseUrl.description: The base URL where the gateway accepts incoming requests

proxySecret.description: Unique secret added as X-RapidAPI-Proxy-Secret header to verify requests come from Rapid Runtime

routes.description: Routing rules that determine how requests are forwarded to backend services

authentication.description: Authentication scheme and configuration for the gateway

rateLimiting.description: Rate limiting policies to control API usage

security.description: Security policies including IP filtering and CORS

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the gateway was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the gateway was last modified

pathPattern.description: URL path pattern to match incoming requests, supports wildcards

targetUrl.description: Backend service URL to forward matching requests to

methods.description: HTTP methods this route handles, empty means all methods

stripPrefix.description: Whether to strip the matched path prefix before forwarding

priority.description: Route priority for matching order, higher values match first

enabled.description: Whether this route is currently active

Route.description: A routing rule that forwards matching requests to a backend service

scheme.description: The primary authentication scheme used by the gateway

requireRapidApiKey.description: Whether the X-RapidAPI-Key header is required for all requests

oauth2Config.description: OAuth2 configuration when scheme is oauth2

requestsPerSecond.description: Maximum requests per second per consumer

requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum requests per minute per consumer

requestsPerDay.description: Maximum requests per day per consumer

maxRequestSizeBytes.description: Maximum request body size in bytes to prevent misuse

burstLimit.description: Maximum burst of concurrent requests allowed

RateLimitConfig.description: Rate limiting configuration to protect APIs from overuse

ipAllowList.description: List of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges

ipDenyList.description: List of denied IP addresses or CIDR ranges

corsEnabled.description: Whether CORS is enabled for cross-origin requests

allowedMethods.description: Allowed HTTP methods for CORS preflight

maxAge.description: CORS preflight response cache duration in seconds

validateProxySecret.description: Whether to validate the X-RapidAPI-Proxy-Secret header on incoming requests
